description: Replace product-tour pages with interactive demos — iframe embeds for Activity Tracker, faithful recreations for Calculator and Compass, chart focus for Finance Hub

userStories.title: Activity Tracker — Replace with 4 tabbed iframes
userStories.description: As a prospect, I want to interact with live Activity Tracker demos via embedded iframes so I can experience the actual platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep existing hero section in DEMO_RENDERERS.tracker
Remove all existing 'Platform & Pricing' and 'Live Dashboard Preview' tab content
Add 4-tab interface: Activity, Leaderboard, Calculator, Forest
Activity tab loads iframe of https://activitytracker-demo.vercel.app/demos/activity.html
Leaderboard tab loads iframe of https://activitytracker-demo.vercel.app/demos/leaderboard.html
Calculator tab loads iframe of https://activitytracker-demo.vercel.app/demos/activity-calc.html
Forest tab loads iframe of https://tree-showcase-omega.vercel.app/mockup.html#daily
Iframes are full-width with min-height 800px
Iframes lazy-load — only load src when tab is activated
Show loading spinner while iframe loads, hide on iframe onload
Include 'Open in new tab' fallback link below each iframe
Tab bar sticks below nav when scrolling into demo section
Works on mobile 390px without horizontal overflow
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Replaced ~868 lines with ~105 lines. 4 tabbed iframes: Activity, Leaderboard, Calculator, Forest. Lazy-loading, spinner, fallback links, sticky tab bar, mobile responsive.

userStories.title: Product Compass — Remove roleplay and quiz, add course catalog
userStories.description: As a prospect, I want to browse a course library so I can see the breadth of training content available.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep existing hero section and 'What's Inside' feature grid in DEMO_RENDERERS.compass
Remove the AI Roleplay Interactive Demo section entirely (Section 3)
Remove the Exam Prep Interactive Quiz section entirely (Section 4)
Remove the Platform Coverage section (Section 5)
Add new Section 3: Course Library with a grid of 6 course cards (ILP Fundamentals, Protection Planning, Retirement Solutions, Critical Illness, Investment-Linked Products, Compliance & Ethics)
Each card shows: thumbnail placeholder, course title, module count, duration estimate, progress bar
Clicking a course card expands to show course detail view inline
Detail view has: video player placeholder (dark thumbnail with centered play button icon), module outline sidebar with 4-6 collapsible lesson titles with duration and completion checkmarks
Detail view has: progress bar showing simulated 40% completion
Detail view has: resources panel listing 3 downloadable items (PDF icon + title)
Below the video area, show 2-3 sample community comments (avatar, name, timestamp, comment text) in a Skool-style discussion layout
Dark theme matching existing design language
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Replaced roleplay, quiz, and coverage sections (~700 lines) with 6-course catalog grid. Each card expands to detail view with video placeholder, module outline with progress checkmarks, resource downloads, and Skool-style discussion comments. Mobile responsive via CSS media query.

userStories.title: Product Compass — Add scripts library section
userStories.description: As a prospect, I want to browse and filter sales scripts so I can see the practical tools available for advisors.
acceptanceCriteria: Add new Section 4 below the course library in DEMO_RENDERERS.compass
Section title: 'Scripts Library' with subtitle
Filter bar with two dropdowns: Category (All, Prospecting, Follow-Up, Closing, Objection Handling) and Audience (All, Young Adult, Working Professional, Retiree, Business Owner)
Selecting a filter re-renders the visible script cards (client-side filtering)
Show 8 sample script cards in a responsive grid
Each card shows: title, category badge (colored pill), audience tag, 2-3 line preview snippet
Each card has a 'View Full Script' button that expands the card to show full script text
Expanded view highlights key phrases in a subtle accent color
Expanded view has a 'Copy Script' button that copies text to clipboard and shows a brief toast confirmation
Script content should be realistic follow-up and prospecting scripts for financial advisors
Dark theme, responsive on mobile 390px
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This adds ~200-300 lines to the compass renderer. Use realistic script data — follow-up messages, prospecting openers, objection handlers for insurance/investment products.

userStories.title: Calculator — Rebuild as investment illustrator
userStories.description: As a prospect, I want to interact with a realistic investment illustrator so I can see how the platform helps advisors present investment plans.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep existing hero section and key capabilities grid in DEMO_RENDERERS.calculator
Replace the current investment illustrator demo section with a new recreation based on Finance Illustrator premium tab
Input fields: Investment Amount (slider or input, $100-$50,000/mo), Premium Frequency (monthly/quarterly/annually toggle), Policy Term (slider 5-30 years), Expected Return Rate (slider 3-8%)
Real-time calculation on any input change — no submit button needed
Summary cards row: Total Premiums Paid, Projected Maturity Value, Net Return, Annualized Yield — each with formatted dollar values
Projection chart using charts.js: area/line chart showing year-by-year growth of investment value vs total premiums paid
Fee breakdown section: management fee %, insurance cost, net vs gross returns comparison shown as two numbers or a simple table
Year-by-year breakdown table: Year, Premium Paid (cumulative), Gross Value, Fees, Net Value — at least 10 rows
Remove or simplify the retirement step-by-step section (keep only if it fits naturally, otherwise remove entirely)
All calculations must produce realistic numbers (compound interest formula with fee deductions)
Dark theme, responsive on mobile 390px
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This rewrites ~1055 lines. The key is realistic financial math — compound growth minus annual fees. Use charts.js for the projection chart. Reference https://present.financeillustrator.com/long-term-investment-illustrator premium tab for layout inspiration.

userStories.title: Finance Hub — Simplify and focus on wealth projection chart
userStories.description: As a prospect, I want to see the wealth projection chart as the centerpiece of the Finance Hub demo.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep existing hero section and 'What You Can Plan' feature grid in DEMO_RENDERERS.financehub
Keep client profile header and summary cards (Total Assets, Liabilities, Net Worth, Cash Flow)
Keep the wealth projection chart — ensure it renders correctly and is visually prominent
Remove or collapse the 4 financial breakdown donut charts into a simpler summary (they are secondary to the main chart)
Keep the Life Goals Timeline section
Keep the goal breakdown table
Ensure the wealth projection chart is the first thing visible below the summary cards
Chart should have clear labels, legend, and goal marker annotations
Dark theme, responsive on mobile 390px
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Minimal changes — mostly reordering and simplifying. The donut charts can be collapsed into a single row or removed entirely. The wealth projection canvas chart should be the hero of this page.

userStories.title: Cross-platform navigation and routing verification
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 5 platform demos to load correctly and navigation between them to work without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page at / shows all 5 platform cards
Clicking each card navigates to its demo page
/calculator loads the investment illustrator demo
/tracker loads the tabbed iframe demos
/compass loads the course library and scripts library
/launchpad loads the campaign wizard (unchanged)
/financehub loads the financial planner with chart
Back button and nav brand click return to the platform grid
No JavaScript console errors on any page
All charts render without errors
All iframe demos load (or show fallback) without errors
Mobile navigation hamburger menu works
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This is the final verification story. Run through all 5 platforms after all other changes are complete. Check browser console for errors.
